title: Louder steps
description: Just makes the vanilla footstep sounds louder!
body:
### Simple resource pack making the player footsteps louder! 

Works from 1.6.1 to 1.21.5!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sf6l7xXdvqU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
